name: minify4u
description: Minify source files (JS/CSS/SCSS/SASS/LESS/HTML/JSON) on save and write the output to a path that is freely configurable per file type.

minify4u.output.markdownDescription:
Simple map of **language â†’ output folder** (relative to the workspace root). The minifier and extension are chosen automatically:

- `javascript` â†’ terser â†’ `.min.js`
- `css` â†’ clean-css â†’ `.min.css`
- `scss` / `sass` â†’ Dart Sass (compile + minify) â†’ `.min.css`
- `less` â†’ less + clean-css â†’ `.min.css`
- `html` â†’ html-minifier-terser â†’ `.min.html`
- `json` / `jsonc` â†’ `.min.json`

For special cases (globs, custom extension, `json-pretty`) use `minify4u.rules` â€” those take precedence.

minify4u.rules.markdownDescription: Rules per file type/glob. On save the **first** matching rule applies; if none matches, `minify4u.output` is used per language.

glob.markdownDescription: Glob relative to the workspace root, e.g. `src/js/**/*.js`. Alternative to `type`.

type.markdownDescription: VS Code language ID, e.g. `javascript`, `css`. Alternative to `glob`.

savePath.markdownDescription: Target folder relative to the workspace root, e.g. `assets/js`.

suffix.markdownDescription: Output file extension, e.g. `.min.js`. Replaces the original extension.

enumDescriptions: Compile + minify SCSS/SASS â†’ CSS (Dart Sass, compressed).
Compile + minify LESS â†’ CSS (less + clean-css).
Convert JSON/JSONC to readable JSON (comments/trailing commas removed, indented) â€” not minified.
